results.name: Feed loads with real posts
results.reasoning: Feed is working properly with real content. Shows Marcus Silva's soccer post from 14 hours ago with actual sports-related text 'Every touch matters. Every rep builds muscle memory', includes profile image, timestamp, sport category (Soccer), Follow button, and a black and white soccer field image. The post has proper formatting and appears to be genuine content rather than placeholder text.

results.name: Sport filter pills exist
results.reasoning: The horizontal row of sport filter pills is clearly visible and functional, showing 'For You', 'Following', 'All', 'Basketball', 'Soccer', and 'Football' options with proper styling and active states indicated by different colors

results.name: Sport filter actually filters
results.reasoning: The Basketball filter is properly highlighted with a red background and white text, distinguishing it from other unselected pills. The visible post from Jordan Williams is correctly tagged with 'Basketball' and shows basketball-related content (gym/workout context). The filtering functionality is working correctly by displaying only basketball-related posts.

results.name: Clear filter restores all posts
results.reasoning: The feed successfully shows mixed sports content after filter removal - visible posts include soccer (Marcus Silva post), basketball, football, and other sports categories in the filter tabs. The 'All' tab is highlighted in orange indicating it's active, and the sports news sidebar shows diverse content from NFL, Super Bowl, Raiders, etc. The feed displays real data with timestamps and proper mixed content distribution.
